message:
fix(scan): calculate Terraform indent from leading whitespace only

The indent calculation was using `raw_line.len() - trimmed.len()` which
gives wrong results when lines have trailing whitespace (since trim()
removes both leading AND trailing).

Fixed to use `trim_start()` to only measure leading whitespace.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
